companies.name: Berkshire Hathaway
companies.thesis: The reference standard. Decentralized conglomerate, fortress balance sheet (~$400B cash). Watch the post-Buffett handoff to Greg Abel and the size problem. Wonderful, fairly priced.

companies.name: CuriosityStream
companies.thesis: Factual-content streamer, ~$190M micro-cap, unprofitable, ~10% dividend yield rich against the losses. Recent dilution. Speculative until the Big Five prove out.

companies.name: SpaceX (Space Exploration Tech.)
companies.thesis: IPO'd 6/12/2026 at $135 (~$1.75T, ~94x revenue), merged with xAI. Dominant launch + Starlink moat, visionary but concentrated management (Musk ~85% voting). Lost ~$4.9B in 2025; Morningstar fair value ~$63. Wonderful company, no margin of safety.
